tasks.subject: Task 0: TanStack Query foundation + lint hard-check
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add @tanstack/react-query, wrap the app in a QueryClientProvider, and add two ESLint guardrails that force all online API work through TanStack Query.

**Files:** package.json; src/api/queryClient.ts (create); App.tsx:108-120; eslint.config.js; tsconfig.json; babel.config.js; jest.config.js; .claude/rules/api-data.md (create); .claude/rules/rules.md

**Acceptance Criteria:** @tanstack/react-query in deps; singleton QueryClient inside ClerkProvider; raw fetch banned outside connector.ts + src/api/**, userSearch.ts exempt with TODO(FE-5); @tanstack/react-query contained to src/hooks/** + src/api/**; npm run check passes.

**Verify:** npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "src/api/queryClient.ts", "App.tsx", "eslint.config.js", "tsconfig.json", "babel.config.js", "jest.config.js", ".claude/rules/api-data.md", ".claude/rules/rules.md"], "verifyCommand": "npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["@tanstack/react-query in deps and installed", "singleton QueryClient provided inside ClerkProvider", "raw fetch banned outside connector.ts + src/api/**; userSearch.ts exempt with TODO(FE-5)", "@tanstack/react-query contained to src/hooks/** + src/api/**", "npm run check passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Rewrite user_connections schema + Zod (read-only)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the synced table and Zod schema with the normalized read-only pair; remove all status/requester/addressee/blocker/deleted_at fields and every write-input shape.

**Files:** src/database/schema.ts:115-123 + :158; src/database/schemas/userConnectionSchemas.ts; src/database/schemas/index.ts:14-21; src/database/schemas/__tests__/userConnectionSchemas.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** table is {user_a_id,user_b_id,inserted_at,updated_at}; Zod exposes only UserConnectionSchema + UserConnection; barrel + schema.ts re-exports updated, no ConnectionStatus; schemas test passes >=90% coverage.

**Verify:** npx jest src/database/schemas/__tests__/userConnectionSchemas.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/database/schema.ts", "src/database/schemas/userConnectionSchemas.ts", "src/database/schemas/index.ts", "src/database/schemas/__tests__/userConnectionSchemas.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest src/database/schemas/__tests__/userConnectionSchemas.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["table is {user_a_id,user_b_id,inserted_at,updated_at}", "Zod exposes only UserConnectionSchema + UserConnection", "barrel + schema.ts re-exports updated; no ConnectionStatus", "schemas test passes at >=90% coverage"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Connector guard — block user_connections uploads
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a READ_ONLY_TABLES guard in uploadCrudEntry so a stray local CRUD against user_connections is skipped before any fetch.

**Files:** src/database/connector.ts; src/database/__tests__/connector.test.ts (create)

**Acceptance Criteria:** user_connections CRUD skipped — no fetch; other tables still upload; connector test passes.

**Verify:** npx jest src/database/__tests__/connector.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/database/connector.ts", "src/database/__tests__/connector.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest src/database/__tests__/connector.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["user_connections CRUD is skipped — no fetch", "other tables still upload", "connector test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Reduce useConnections to reads-only
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Re-key the connection hooks to the normalized pair, return only the connected list, remove the status/pending queries, resolve the other participant both directions.

**Files:** src/hooks/useConnections.ts:1-111; src/hooks/index.ts; src/hooks/__tests__/useConnections.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** useConnections returns {connections,isLoading} resolving other_user_id both directions; useConnectionWith returns {id}|null re-keyed to pair, no status; HydratedConnection drops status/requester/addressee/blocker; shared-calendar/profile hooks unchanged + passing.

**Verify:** npx jest src/hooks/__tests__/useConnections.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/useConnections.ts", "src/hooks/index.ts", "src/hooks/__tests__/useConnections.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest src/hooks/__tests__/useConnections.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["useConnections returns {connections,isLoading} resolving other_user_id both directions", "useConnectionWith returns {id}|null re-keyed to the pair", "HydratedConnection drops status/requester/addressee/blocker", "shared-calendar/profile hooks unchanged and passing"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Delete the client write path
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove src/utils/connections.ts and its barrel re-export and test — the six mutation functions move to REST in FE-2.

**Files:** src/utils/connections.ts (delete); src/utils/__tests__/connections.test.ts (delete); src/utils/index.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** connections.ts + its test deleted; barrel no longer re-exports mutations; only the four screens still reference removed symbols (cleared in Task 5).

**Verify:** npx jest src/utils/

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/utils/connections.ts", "src/utils/__tests__/connections.test.ts", "src/utils/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest src/utils/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["connections.ts + its test deleted", "barrel no longer re-exports mutations", "only the four screens still reference the removed symbols (cleared in Task 5)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Neutralize the four People-tab screens (green gate)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make the four screens compile against the new data layer with minimal placeholders so npm run check is fully green. Real rewires are FE-4/5/6/7.

**Files:** src/screens/people/{ConnectionsScreen,AddConnectionScreen,PersonProfileScreen}.tsx; src/screens/ProfileScreen.tsx; src/screens/people/__tests__/{ConnectionsScreen,AddConnectionScreen,PersonProfileScreen}.test.tsx; src/screens/__tests__/ProfileScreen.test.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:** no screen imports deleted mutations or removed hook fields; ConnectionsScreen renders connected list, pending removed; AddConnectionScreen actions disabled placeholders; PersonProfileScreen connected-from-presence, Remove/Block disabled; ProfileScreen pending badge dropped, Connections row kept; screen tests rewritten; npm run check passes.

**Verify:** npm run check (THE GREEN GATE)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/screens/people/ConnectionsScreen.tsx", "src/screens/people/AddConnectionScreen.tsx", "src/screens/people/PersonProfileScreen.tsx", "src/screens/ProfileScreen.tsx", "src/screens/people/__tests__/ConnectionsScreen.test.tsx", "src/screens/people/__tests__/AddConnectionScreen.test.tsx", "src/screens/people/__tests__/PersonProfileScreen.test.tsx", "src/screens/__tests__/ProfileScreen.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no screen imports deleted mutations or removed hook fields", "ConnectionsScreen renders connected list, pending removed", "AddConnectionScreen actions disabled placeholders", "PersonProfileScreen connected-from-presence; Remove/Block disabled", "ProfileScreen pending badge dropped; Connections row kept", "screen tests rewritten; npm run check passes"]}
```
